error_signature: Expected Supabase credentials host to be a string
title: Supabase credentials host not recognized
symptom: When attempting to use Supabase credentials, an error indicates that the host must be a string. The user cannot load table lists or use the vector store due to this issue.
not_this_if: Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: The issue arises from a bug in the n8n-nodes-supabase-memory package version 0.1.0, which causes the Supabase credentials to not be recognized properly, leading to errors when trying to access Supabase resources.
fix_steps: Upgrade the n8n-nodes-supabase-memory package to a stable version
Verify the Supabase credentials are correctly configured
agent_instruction: Upgrade the n8n-nodes-supabase-memory package to resolve the credentials issue.
